summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated artifact covers 20 of 25 listed PRs; those 20 are independent open PRs with no shared canonical and no planned mutation. Five listed PRs were not hydrated in the preflight artifact, so they are scoped needs_human for live-state hydration before classification.
